NO_SESSION: No session found. Please log in.
NO_CUSTOMER_LINKED: No customer linked to your account.
ORDER_HAS_DOCUMENT_HISTORY: Orders with document history cannot be deleted.
OFFER_HAS_DOCUMENT_HISTORY: Offers with document history cannot be deleted.
VERSION_CONFLICT: The data was changed by another user. Please reload and try again.
UNSUPPORTED_REVISION_SNAPSHOT_VERSION: This revision version is not supported.
INVALID_REVISION_SNAPSHOT: The stored revision is invalid and cannot be restored.
NO_TARIFF: No tariff found for this product and contract.
NO_CELL: No cell configured for the selected row and column.
NO_DEFAULT: No default price configured for this cell.
NO_COLUMN: Duration is not configured in any tariff column.
NO_ROW: Quantity is outside all configured quantity ranges.
INVALID_INPUT: Invalid input. Duration and quantity must be positive integers.
DOCUMENT_NOT_RENAMABLE: Only generated or uploaded documents can be renamed.
DOCUMENT_PROCESSING: A document cannot be deleted while processing.
DOCUMENT_UPLOAD_IN_PROGRESS: Document upload is already in progress.
REMOTE_DOCUMENT_CONFLICT: The document was changed on the remote server.
TEMPLATE_EXISTS: A template with this name already exists.
PRISMA_UNIQUE_CONSTRAINT: An entry with these values already exists.
PRISMA_FOREIGN_KEY: This record cannot be deleted because it is still in use.
PRISMA_VALIDATION_ERROR: The provided data does not match the validation rules.
WEBDAV_UNAUTHORIZED: Wrong username or password for cloud storage.
WEBDAV_FORBIDDEN: No permission to write to this folder.
WEBDAV_NOT_FOUND: File or directory not found in cloud storage.
WEBDAV_METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED: The WebDAV action is not supported by the server.
INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: Something went wrong on our end.
